a1.verb_hint: Put Have/Has before the subject.
Use Has + singular subject + past participle.
Use question word + have/has + subject + past participle.
Use ever in experience questions.
Use Has + subject + participle + yet/already.

questions.question: Have you seen it? Yes, I {a1}

a1.verb_hint: Short answers repeat have or has.

variants: Have you seen it? Yes, I {a1}

a1.verb_hint: Use Have + plural subject + past participle.
Use Has + singular name + past participle.
Keep have/has before the subject in wh-questions.
Use ever between the subject and past participle in experience questions.
Already can appear in Present Perfect questions.

questions.question: {a1} the report? not Did you finished

a1.verb_hint: Do not use did + past participle for Present Perfect.

variants: {a1} the report? not Did you finished
